creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Sat Feb 23 20:02:18 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.144
+PORTVERSION=	4.145
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Tue Feb 26 02:26:27 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.144.tar.gz) = c9ac98edea9c7c8105292a4b370b9f8f
-SHA256 (munger-4.144.tar.gz) = 
65ae488d87783cfd042029bbcb6610586e1eb8fb9bbe09f0da920fc838ea7fe4
-SIZE (munger-4.144.tar.gz) = 291407
+MD5 (munger-4.145.tar.gz) = e9755f02bdc185b74c3489cd0ba62436
+SHA256 (munger-4.145.tar.gz) = 
14a5ee11b2453909e85a8a488476b79ac68db18467134a711c113f127b82778a
+SIZE (munger-4.145.tar.gz) = 288826
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/pkg-plist	Tue Feb 26 00:42:23 2008
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
  bin/munger
-lib/libmunger.so.33
+lib/libmunger.so.34
  lib/libminimunger.a
  include/minimunger.h
  %%DATADIR%%/ipdatabase.munger
@@ -18,7 +18,6 @@
  %%DATADIR%%/blog.css
  %%DATADIR%%/blog.cgi
  %%DATADIR%%/rss.munger
-%%DATADIR%%/mime2munger.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/xmlquery.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/filter.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/cgi.munger
